response.summary: The implemented detail-and-completion flow appears semantically fit for SL-002. Dashboard items open into a user-readable detail view, the detail view uses clear task wording and a direct 'Mark as Done' action, rationale and status context are presented in plain language, fallback/error states are safe and understandable, and status/date text is human-readable without exposing raw payloads or internal implementation language on the core in-scope surfaces.
